description_long: This object is a rectangular, open-top toolbox constructed primarily from a light-colored material that resembles wood or a wood composite. The sides are reinforced with thicker corner segments, and the long sides feature cut-out handles for easy carrying. The interior is a single, unobstructed compartment, suitable for holding tools or other items. The exterior surface is matte and slightly textured, with visible grain patterns and a faint, stamped brand marking on the long sides. There are no visible latches, hinges, or internal dividers, giving it a simple and utilitarian appearance.
description: A rectangular, open-top wooden toolbox with cut-out side handles and a single large compartment. The exterior is matte, lightly textured, and features subtle brand markings.
description_view_0: The short end of the toolbox is visible, showing the solid side panel and reinforced corners.
description_view_1: The long side of the toolbox is shown, displaying the cut-out handle and faint brand marking at the center.
description_view_2: The opposite short end is visible, mirroring the features of the first short side with reinforced corners.
description_view_3: The other long side is shown, also featuring a cut-out handle and a faint brand marking.
attribute_handle_type: Rectangular cut-out handles on each long side, fixed, integrated into the wood, no ergonomic padding.
attribute_latch_mechanism: None visible; the toolbox is open-top with no latching or locking mechanism.
attribute_brand_logo: A faint, rectangular brand marking is visible at the center of each long side, with the text 'KOHEZ' readable.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large open compartment with no internal trays, dividers, or external drawers; all sides are fixed.
attribute_external_labeling: 'KOHEZ' brand marking on both long sides, centered, in faint block letters.
